regex: (how does facebook work|how do ads work)
response: Facebook ads work by showing your business to people based on their interests and location. It's like handing a digital flyer only to the people who are already looking for what you sell.
A landing page is a simple, one-page website designed to do just one thing: turn a visitor into a customer by asking them to call you, buy a product, or fill out a form.
A sales funnel is a step-by-step digital journey that guides a complete stranger into becoming a loyal, paying customer. We are experts at building these automated journeys for you!
A Pixel is a tiny piece of code we put on your website. It helps us track who visits your site so we can show them your ads again later. It's very smart and helps save you money!
Retargeting means showing ads to people who have already visited your website but didn't buy anything yet. It reminds them to come back and finish their purchase, which is highly effective!
CPC stands for 'Cost Per Click'. It simply means how much money you pay the advertising platform (like Google or Facebook) every time someone clicks on your ad.
CTR stands for 'Click-Through Rate'. It is the percentage of people who saw your ad and actually clicked on it. A higher CTR means your ad is very interesting to people!
